div1.entryFree:
Gossip, vb. 1) tr. to christen: adoptious christendoms, that blinking Cupid --s, All's I, 1, 189.
2) intr. to make merry, to drink and chat at a christening or any other feast: with all my heart I'll g. at this feast, Err. V, 407. will you walk in to see their --ing, Err. V, 407 full often hath she --ed by my side, Mids. II, 1, 125. at feasts, full of warm blood, of mirth, of --ing, John V, 2, 59.
